final_savage_verdict: 🎯 SCIENTIFIC CONCLUSION: Your command suite has a 100% failure rate against your own complexity standards. The 'intelligent' commands average 6.25/5 complexity (25% over limit) and consume 14.5k tokens of pure bloat. The biggest joke? Your 'adaptive-complexity-router' is too complex to route complexity. This isn't AI-assisted development - it's complexity-assisted procrastination. RECOMMENDATION: Delete everything and start with a single 50-line command that actually works.
